nasb.text: But the Lord was with Joseph and extended kindness to him, and gave him favor in the sight of the chief jailer.

esv.text: But the Lord was with Joseph and showed him steadfast love and gave him favor in the sight of the keeper of the prison.

cnv.text: 但是，耶和華與約瑟同在，向他施慈愛，使他得到監獄長的歡心。

ccb.text: 约瑟坐牢的时候，耶和华与他同在，恩待他，使监狱长赏识他。

csbs.text: 然而，耶和华与约瑟同在，向他施慈爱，使他在监狱长的眼前蒙恩。
